# zstack_san_sec_security_machine (Resource)

Manage SAN security machines in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `management_ip` (String) The management IP of the security machine.
- `model` (String) The model of the security machine.
- `name` (String) The name of the security machine.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The login password for the security machine.
- `port` (Number) The management port of the security machine.
- `secret_resource_pool_uuid` (String) The secret resource pool UUID of the security machine.
- `type` (String) The type of the security machine.
- `zone_uuid` (String) The zone UUID of the security machine.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the security machine.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the security machine.
- `status` (String) The status of the security machine.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the security machine.
